sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιβαίνω

- Transliteration: Epibaino

- Phonetic: ep-ee-bah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to get upon, mount

a. to embark in

b. to go aboard (a ship)

2. to set foot in, enter

- Origin: from G1909 and the base of G939

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and the base of G939; to walk upon that is mount ascend embark arrive: - come (into) enter into go aboard sit upon take ship.
